Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz appeared by telephone for and with Frances Gurriere (present in Court). Nicholas Burke appeared by telephone for Kenneth Gurriere.

Mr. Burke stated that a settlement has been reached and that he can provide an order to the Court later today. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement (subject to receipt and review of the order). The Petition for Instructions is off calendar.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Continued To Aug-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for and with Frances Gurriere. Ernest Montanari for and with Kenneth Gurriere and Debra Gurriere (Beneficiaries). Gene Marchi (Successor Trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Marchi stated that his Attorney did not make an appearance because they are in a neutral position. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 1, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 3, 2014. Status on mediation was set for July 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. The Petition for Instructions was continued to August 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 a one half day evidentiary hearing.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, (415) 433-5888. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Continued To May-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Enforce Settlement Under Ccp 664.4
Off Calendar May-02-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for and with Francis Gurriere. Elizabeht Hansen for Frank Gurriere.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that proper notice was not given and that he did not receive a call from Ms. Hansen. Ms. Hansen stated that she and Mr. Koplowitz had been communicating by email and that she emailed him notice of her intent to argue. Proper notice not having been given the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Motion For Order To Enforce Settlement Agreement Under CCP 664.4 (sic CCP 664.6) GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order. Request to Strike Untimely Purported Response GRANTED.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helene Wenzel and Elizabeth Hansen for and with Frank Gurriere. Edward Koplowitz for and with Frances Gurriere.

The Parties stated that they do not have a written agreement and that they are in dispute as to the language of the written agreement. The Parties also spoke of Mr. Marchi not releasing the $20,000.00 to Frances and the dismissal not being signed. Mr. Koplowitz will file a 664.6 Motion. The Court will not amend the order regarding release of funds. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Jan-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for and with Frances Gurriere (Trustee). Helene Wenzel and Elizabeth Hansen for and with Frank Gurriere.

Ms. Hansen stated that they worked out the material terms of an agreement for dismissal with prejudice of the 17200 petition. Ms. Hansen also read the terms of the agreement for the record. Mr. Koplowitz will draft the agreement by Wednesday morning and turn it over to Ms. Hansen to effectuate the agreement. All documents are to be turned over by January 12, 2011. Mr. Koplowitz will also prepare an order for Wells Fargo to release the frozen accounts. Ms. Hansen is to file a dismissal. The matter was continued to January 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status. Counsel is to inform the Examiner by noon January 27, 2011 if there is or is not a dispute. Frank Gurriere and Francis Gurriere both stated that they understood and agreed to the terms of the settlement agreement.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Continued To Jan-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen and Helene Wenzel for and with Frank Gurriere. Edward Koplowitz for Frances Gurriere.

Counsel reported that they attended mediation twice, that mediation was unsuccessful, presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the missing funds, violation of a Court order, the right to conduct discovery, Mr. Koplowitz being allowed to file a response, setting the matter for an evidentiary hearing and the real property being transferred out of the Trust. Mr. Koplowitz's Client is to file the accounting by December 30, 2010. Mr. Koplowitz is to file his objection/response to the underlying petition filed on September 7, 2010 as well as to the supplement to the petition filed on November 16, 2010 by December 13, 2010. The reply if any is to be filed by December 27, 2010. The matter was continued to January 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status and for setting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: J. Chien.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee To Compel Trustee To Account
Off Calendar Oct-25-2010 Continued To Nov-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Hansen and Helene Wenzel for and with Frank Gurriere. Ed Koplowitz for and with Francis Gurriere.

The Court stated that this matter was originally noticed for last Wednesday (9/8/10), that it was denied without prejudice; the reason having to do with notice only, that the ruling was not based on the merits, that today the substance of the ex-parte relief would be addressed, and noted that the underlying petition for removal is currently set for 10/25/10. In addition, the Court stated that the same day that the underlying petition was filed an ex-parte for suspension of powers and to appoint Thomas Lucas as Successor Trustee was filed which was the ex-parte that was denied for notice issues. Ms Hansen argued in support of the suspension noting that her client wants a third party to take over. Mr. Koplowitz argued that the papers submitted previously were procedurally deficient, that they continue to be deficient, that there are notices issues, and that the new papers weren't served on him. In addition, he argued that they have not made a verified showing of irreparable injury and harm, that the matter is set for 10/25/10, that it can be dealt with at that time, and that he urged opposing Counsel to mediate. Mr. Koplowitz also confirmed for the Court that the $505,000.00 proceeds from the Cap Street property were put into the Mechanics Bank account, that it is a Trustee account under Ms. Gurriere as Trustee of the Frank G. Gurriere Trust, and noted that the funds aren't going to be withdrawn. Ms. Hansen presented additional argument noting that Ms. Gurriere kept the cashier's checks from 7/14/10 until now, that it shows her actions then retaliation, and that her client doesn't wish to wait until 10/25/10. Matter submitted. The Court denied the request, directed Mr. Koplowitz to prepare the order, and continued the 10/25/10 hearing to 11/22/10.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312.

Ex Parte Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Denied
